dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Another morning. Another day.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: ALARM RING

dialogue.speaker: NARI
dialogue.line: (Groan) Already?

dialogue.speaker: NARI
dialogue.line: I drag myself out of bed, the same routine every day. School, homework, repeat.

dialogue.speaker: NARI
dialogue.line: And then there’s… this.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SIGH

dialogue.speaker: NARI
dialogue.line: My reflection. Plain. Average. Nothing special. Just… me.

dialogue.speaker: NARI
dialogue.line: At least my uniform hides most of it.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CHIRP CHIRP

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FOOTSTEPS

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The school gate is already bustling. And there they are. My friends.

dialogue.speaker: MIRAE
dialogue.line: Nari! Over here!

dialogue.speaker: NARI
dialogue.line: Mirae, Yuri, Ryun. They shine. Literally. Even in school uniforms, they stand out like celebrities.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: MURMUR MURMUR (students whispering)

dialogue.speaker: STUDENT A
dialogue.line: Wow, there’s Mirae again. So pretty.

dialogue.speaker: STUDENT B
dialogue.line: Yuri’s so cute! And Ryun’s style is always on point.

dialogue.speaker: NARI
dialogue.line: And then there’s me, trailing behind them, practically invisible.

dialogue.speaker: YURI
dialogue.line: Good morning, Nari! You’re just in time.

dialogue.speaker: NARI
dialogue.line: Morning, guys.

dialogue.speaker: RYUN
dialogue.line: Did you finish the math homework? I barely got through it.

dialogue.speaker: NARI
dialogue.line: Yeah, it was tough. But I managed.

dialogue.speaker: MIRAE
dialogue.line: See? Nari’s always so diligent. Unlike some people.

dialogue.speaker: RYUN
dialogue.line: Hey! I try!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: RINGGGG (school bell)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Class passes by in a blur. My gaze keeps drifting to them. Mirae, confidently answering a question. Yuri, diligently taking notes with her neat handwriting. Ryun, sketching something cool in her notebook during a break.

dialogue.speaker: NARI
dialogue.line: They're all so talented, so captivating.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLATTER (lunch trays)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Lunchtime. The loudest part of the day.

dialogue.speaker: MIRAE
dialogue.line: Ugh, this kimchi stew is spicier than usual today.

dialogue.speaker: YURI
dialogue.line: Really? I think it’s just right! Here, Nari, try some of my fish cakes.

dialogue.speaker: NARI
dialogue.line: Oh, thanks, Yuri.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CHEW CHEW

dialogue.speaker: RYUN
dialogue.line: Did you guys see that new café that opened near the station? Their pastries look amazing on Instagram.

dialogue.speaker: MIRAE
dialogue.line: Oh, I saw that! We should totally go after school tomorrow.

dialogue.speaker: YURI
dialogue.line: Sounds fun! What do you think, Nari?

dialogue.speaker: NARI
dialogue.line: Uh, yeah, sounds good.

dialogue.speaker: NARI
dialogue.line: I probably won't have anything stylish enough to wear, or know how to pose for their 'aesthetic' photos. I'll just be… there.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CHATTER CHATTER

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: After school. The girls are gathered, making plans.

dialogue.speaker: MIRAE
dialogue.line: So, Saturday night, my place. We can watch a movie.

dialogue.speaker: YURI
dialogue.line: Ooh, a horror movie? I'll bring snacks!

dialogue.speaker: RYUN
dialogue.line: I’m in. Nari, you coming?

dialogue.speaker: NARI
dialogue.line: Oh, um… I’m not sure. I might have plans with my family.

dialogue.speaker: NARI
dialogue.line: It's a lie. I just don't want to be the one who screams at every jump scare while they're all cool and composed. Or the one who doesn't know what to say.

dialogue.speaker: MIRAE
dialogue.line: Aw, too bad. Well, next time then!

dialogue.speaker: NARI
dialogue.line: Yeah… next time.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FOOTSTEPS (fading)

dialogue.speaker: NARI
dialogue.line: I watch them walk away, laughing, their voices carrying in the evening air. They're a perfect, dazzling trio.

dialogue.speaker: NARI
dialogue.line: And I'm just… the odd girl out.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SIGH

summary: Nari, an average high school student, navigates her first day back at school, constantly feeling overshadowed and insecure when compared to her three beautiful and popular best friends, Mirae, Yuri, and Ryun, solidifying her feeling of being the 'odd girl out'.
